input.prBody: This pull request focuses on extension cleanup and stronger typing in command handlers.

taskContext.title: Kody rules por time
taskContext.description: Atualmente as kodyRules são cadastradas somente com organizationId. Quando temos 2 workspace(team) configurado, fica imprevisível de qual time ele vai buscar a configuração de billing. Ao tentar cadastrar uma nova regra ele deu status invalid para licença por causa do status errado do billing.
acceptanceCriteria: Kody rules must be scoped by team, not only organization
Billing and license resolution must use the correct team context
The rule creation flow must work when teams have different subscription states

expectedOutcome.summaryText:
## Business Rules Validation

**Status:** Issues Found
**Confidence:** medium

### Findings

#### MUST_FIX: Scope mismatch between task and PR diff
**Requirement:** "Kody rules must be scoped by team, not only organization"
**Missing in code:** No evidence in this PR diff of changes related to kodyRules, teamId, or billing/license resolution by team.
**Suggested action:** Update the PR with the implementation for the task scope, or link the correct task if this PR is unrelated.
summaryContains: No evidence in this PR diff
